name: Duck with Honey & Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the duck and dry it thoroughly.
2. Rub salt and pepper into the cavity of the duck.
3. Place two cloves in the onion and put them together in the duck's cavity.
4. Mix 4 tablespoons of honey with 1 tablespoon (or more) of curry powder, salt, and pepper until well combined.
5. Roast the duck at a temperature of 325°F for approximately one hour.
6. After the initial hour, begin basting the duck every few minutes with the honey/curry mixture for an additional hour, or until the internal temperature reaches the desired level of doneness.
7. This method also works well when roasting chickens.
